summary: Verified Chichu lettering scheme feature end-to-end via Playwright. All 4 scenarios pass: initial overline shows Speffz/BUFFER C; switching to Chichu updates corner-buffer to 'J' and edge-buffer to 'a'; header overline updates to include 'CHICHU (彳亍)'; letter-pair-display shows valid 2-letter uppercase pair (e.g., 'GF','PR'); solveCurrent() x3 increments getSuccess to 3 and hud-solved to 'Solved3'; switching back to Speffz resets corner=C, edge=c.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chichu scheme fully working. Overline element has no data-testid but is locatable via text 'CORNER 3-STYLE'. Screenshot verified overline text 'CORNER 3-STYLE · BUFFER J · CHICHU (彳亍)' after switching. Buffer selects use native <select> - use select_option by value ('chichu'/'speffz').
